query: SELECT configId, clientId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM client_visibility GROUP BY configId, clientId HAVING cnt > 1 LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4NCq8mAsshAuKGA.2865343ca485 --database K5ogkLhSXtccCnqH4Vm3fs --execute SELECT configId, clientId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM client_visibility GROUP BY configId, clientId HAVING cnt > 1 LIMIT 5;
